partsUsed: Leaves (tea); honey from nectar is a separate famous product
habitat: New Zealand and SE Australia scrub and heath.
traditionalUsesEn: Traditional Māori leaf use; global fame via mānuka honey antimicrobial research (methylglyoxal).
traditionalUsesDe: Traditionelle māorische Blattnutzung; global bekannt durch Manuka-Honig-Forschung.
activeCompounds: Leaf essential oil (leptospermone and related); honey: MGO, DHA
preparation: Leaf tea; honey as food (UMF/MGO graded products for quality).
cautions: Honey not for infants under 1 year. Leaf oil diluted if used topically.
historicalNotes: Name from Māori; honey industry major NZ export.
